subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thy forgiveness for every attribute and quality ascribed unto me, save that of servitude at Thy threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انی استغفرک من کل وصف و نعت فی حقی الا العبودیه لعتبتک
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @martyrs and martyrdom
